_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: lower head circumference benchmarked against LMSz NF1 growth charts related to developmental delay (Standardized beta = 0.24; 95% CI = [0.05, 0.42]; P < 0.02)
details: LMSz NF1 growth charts showed significant relationship with developmental delay (Standardized beta = 0.24; 95% CI = [0.05, 0.42]; P < 0.02)
